subject: fix(quality): CLAUDE.md compliance — dead code, stale dep, docs, tutorial
body:
- Remove unused KEYBOARD_DETECTION_THRESHOLD_PX from config.ts (only
  consumer was the web visualViewport handler in BottomSheet, which was
  removed when web got its own BottomSheetWeb component)
- Remove contentScrollOffset ref from contentPanResponder useMemo deps
  (refs never change identity — including it was misleading, not functional)
- Update CLAUDE.md Debug System sources to match actual implementation
  (boot/supabase/location/map/search/pwa/global, not glow-props template)
- Update TutorialModal step 4 to platform-neutral language ("scroll the
  list" instead of "pull the list up/down") since web uses a simple
  scrollable panel, not a draggable bottom sheet

Tags: cleanup, docs, tutorial, compliance
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: mobile-web
Semver: patch
